We validate our circuit discovery method on multiple benchmarks. For large-scale
experiments we leverage shared GPU infrastructure for open-weight models.

@article{bau2024nnsight,
  title={NNsight and NDIF: Democratizing Access to Open-Weight Foundation Model Internals},
  author={Bau, David and others},
  journal={ICLR 2025},
  year={2025},
  eprint={2407.14561},
  archivePrefix={arXiv}
}
